steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The opening sentence establishes what people typically think: “feathered dinosaurs” are winged ones like Microraptor. The word “However” signals a direct contrast — the underlined sentence contradicts this narrow view by explaining that many non-winged dinosaurs also had feathers.

steps.title: Match the contrast function to the answer
steps.content: D correctly describes the function: the sentence indicates that the dinosaurs mentioned earlier (the winged Microraptor) weren't the only ones with feathers — it expands our understanding beyond that initial, limited scope. The other choices all misidentify what the sentence does — A invents discussion of purpose, B mistakes the claim for an example (the example comes next), and C invokes a definition that doesn't exist. That matches choice D — D is correct.
